points.name: Enter Water Pump
points.description: Status of Entering Water Temperature

points.name: Return Plenum Pressure Status
points.description: Current value of the Return Plenum Pressure Sensor

points.name: Return Plenum Control Signal
points.description: Current Return Plenum Control Signal (Motorized Exhaust Damper)

points.name: Mixed Air Temp
points.description: Mixed air temperature sensor status. Used on units with Direct Fire Heat.

points.name: Actual Heat Rise
points.description: Difference between supply air temperature and mixed air temperature on units with Direct Fire Heat.

points.name: Calculated Heat Rise
points.description: The heat rise limit determined by how open the Outside Damper is.

points.name: Supply Air Relative Humidity
points.description: If an EBUS Supply Air Sensor is being used this shows the current supply air relative humidity reading.

points.name: Supply Air Dew Point
points.description: If an EBUS Supply Air Sensor is being used this shows the current calculated supply air dew point.

points.name: Space Dew Point
points.description: Current value of the calculated Space Dew Point.

points.name: Return Dew Point
points.description: Current value of the calculated Return Dew Point.

points.name: Occupied Cooling Setpoint
points.description: If the control temperature rises one deadband above this setpoint, the control activates the cooling demand. This setpoint does not determine the mode in Occupied operation if the unit is configured for Supply Air Cooling or Supply Air Tempering.

points.name: Occupied Heating Setpoint
points.description: If the control temperature drops one deadband below this setpoint, the control activates the heating demand. This setpoint does not determine the mode in Occupied operation if the unit is configured for Supply Air Cooling or Supply Air Tempering.

points.name: Hood On Cooling Setpoint
points.description: This is the Cooling Mode Enable Setpoint used only in Hood On Mode or Space Temperature Control of High Percentage Outdoor Air Units or VAV Tempering

points.name: Hood On Heating Setpoint
points.description: This is the Heating Mode Enable Setpoint used only in Hood On Mode or Space Temperature Control of High Percentage Outdoor Air Units or VAV Tempering

points.name: Unoccupied Cooling Offset
points.description: During the Unoccupied Mode of Operation, this Setpoint offsets the Occupied Cooling Setpoint up by this user- adjustable amount. Use the default setting of 30°F for this setpoint to prevent Cooling during the Unoccupied Mode.

points.name: Unoccupied Heating Offset
points.description: During the Unoccupied Mode of Operation, this Setpoint offsets the Occupied Heating Setpoint down by this user- adjustable amount. Use the default setting of 30°F for this setpoint to prevent Heating during Unoccupied Mode.

points.name: Mode Select Deadband
points.description: This value is added to and subtracted from the HVAC Mode Setpoints to create a control deadband range

points.name: Max Coil Setpoint Reset Limit
points.description: This is the highest that the Coil Temperature resets to during Space Humidity Reset of the Coil Suction Temperature Setpoint. If no coil temperature reset is required, this value should be set the same as the Min Coil Reset Limit.

points.name: Min Coil Setpoint Reset Limit
points.description: This is the lowest the Coil Temperature resets to during Space Humidity Reset of the Coil Suction Temperature Setpoint. If no coil temperature reset is required, this value should be set the same as the Max Coil Reset Limit.

points.name: Supply Air Cooling Setpoint
points.description: Supply Air Cooling Setpoint. If Supply Air Reset is configured this is the Low SAT Cooling Reset Value

points.name: Supply Air Heating Setpoint
points.description: Supply Air Heating Setpoint. If Supply Air Reset is configured this is the Low SAT Heating Reset Value

points.name: Max SAT Cooling Setpoint Reset Limit
points.description: If Supply Air Reset is configured this is the High SAT Cooling Reset Value

points.name: Max SAT Heating Setpoint Reset Limit
points.description: If Supply Air Reset is configured this is the High SAT Heating Reset Value

points.name: Supply Air Cooling Staging Window
points.description: In Cooling Mode, if the Supply Air Temperature drops below the Active Supply Air Cooling Setpoint minus this Staging Window, the Cooling Stage deactivates after its Minimum Run Time

points.name: Supply Air Heating Staging Window
points.description: In Heating Mode, if the Supply Air Temperature rises above the Active Supply Air Heating Setpoint plus this Staging Window, the Heating Stage deactivates after its Minimum Run Time

points.name: Warm-Up Target Temperature (See AV: 89 for Cool-Down Target Temperature)
points.description: If Morning Warm-Up is configured, then upon entering occupied mode, the Warm-Up Mode activates if the Return Air is below this temperature by one degree

points.name: Warm-Up Mode Supply Air Setpoint
points.description: During Morning Warm-Up, the Supply Air Temperature is controlled to this Setpoint

points.name: Cool-Down Mode Supply Air Setpoint
points.description: During Morning Cool-Down, the Supply Air Temperature is controlled to this Setpoint

points.name: Mechanical Cooling Outdoor Air Lockout
points.description: Mechanical Cooling is locked out when the Outdoor Air Temperature is below this Setpoint

points.name: Mechanical Heating Outdoor Air Lockout
points.description: Mechanical Heating is locked out when the Outdoor Air Temperature is above this Setpoint

points.name: Low Supply Temp Cutoff Alarm
points.description: Cooling is disabled if the Supply Air Temperature falls below this value. See sequence for more details

points.name: High Supply Temp Cutoff Alarm
points.description: Heating is disabled if the Supply Air Temperature rises above this value. See sequence for more details

points.name: Preheater Cooling Mode Setpoint
points.description: If the Preheater is enabled, and the unit is in the Cooling Mode, this is sent to the Preheat-X Controller to control Leaving Air Temperature

points.name: Preheater Venting Mode Setpoint
points.description: If the Preheater is enabled, and the unit is in the Vent Mode, this setpoint is sent to the Preheat-X Controller to control Leaving Air Temperature

points.name: Preheater Heating Mode Setpoint
points.description: If the Preheater is enabled, and the unit is in the Heating Mode, this setpoint is sent to the Preheat-X Controller to control Leaving Air Temperature

points.name: Outdoor Air Dewpoint Setpoint
points.description: On an MUA unit, if the OA dewpoint rises above this setpoint, Dehumidification is initiated

points.name: Economizer Enable Setpoint
points.description: The economizer is enabled if the outdoor drybulb, dewpoint, or wetbulb temperature falls below this setpoint

points.name: Heat Wheel Defrost Enable Setpoint
points.description: The unit goes into Heat Wheel Defrost if the Outdoor Air is below this setpoint

points.name: PreHeat Enable Setpoint
points.description: If the Supply Fan is energized, this is the temperature at which the Preheat Relay activates, or the Preheat-X activates. Operates only in the Occupied Mode.

points.name: Sensor Slide Offset Max Effect
points.description: If the space sensor has the optional slide adjustment feature, this is the maximum amount the slide can adjust the current heating and cooling setpoints up or down with full deflection of the slide

points.name: Space Sensor Calibration Offset
points.description: If the Space Temperature Sensor is reading incorrectly, use this option to enter an offset temperature to adjust the Sensor’s Temperature

points.name: Supply Air Sensor Calibration Offset
points.description: If the Supply Air Temperature Sensor is reading incorrectly, use this option to enter an offset temperature to adjust the Sensor’s Temperature

points.name: Return Air Sensor Calibration Offset
points.description: If the Return Temperature Sensor is reading incorrectly, use this option to enter an offset temperature to adjust the Sensor’s Temperature

points.name: Outdoor Air Sensor Calibration Offset
points.description: If the Outdoor Temperature Sensor is reading incorrectly, use this option to enter an offset temperature to adjust the Sensor’s Temperature

points.name: Carbon Dioxide Sensor Calibration Offset
points.description: If the CO2 Sensor is reading incorrectly, use this option to enter an offset value to adjust the Sensor’s CO2 reading

points.name: Low Ambient Protection Setpoint
points.description: Temperature at which the Low Ambient Relay activates in the Occupied or Unoccupied Mode

points.name: SAT Cool Setpoint Reset Source Low Limit
points.description: If doing Supply Air Setpoint Reset, this is the Low Reset Source value in Cooling that corresponds to the Supply Air Cool High Reset Setpoint

points.name: SAT Cool Setpoint Reset Source High Limit
points.description: If doing Supply Air Setpoint Reset, this is the High Reset Source value in Cooling that corresponds to the Supply Air Cooling Setpoint (Low Reset)

points.name: SAT Heat Setpoint Reset Source Low Limit
points.description: If doing Supply Air Setpoint Reset, this is the Low Reset Source value in Heating that corresponds to the Supply Air Heating High Reset Setpoint

points.name: SAT Heat Setpoint Reset Source High Limit
points.description: If doing Supply Air Setpoint Reset, this is the High Reset Source value in Heating that corresponds to the Supply Air Heating Setpoint (Low Reset)

points.name: Control Temperature High Alarm Offset
points.description: If the temperature of the controlling sensor rises above the Occupied Cooling Setpoint by this value, a High Control Temp Alarm occurs. Only applies if configured for Space or Return Air Temp Control, or as Single Zone VAV.

points.name: Control Temperature Low Alarm Offset
points.description: If the temperature of the controlling sensor falls below the Occupied Heating Setpoint by this value, a Low Control Temp Alarm occurs. Only applies if configured for Space or Return Air Temp Control, or as Single Zone VAV.

points.name: Heat Pump Compressor Heat Lockout
points.description: Compressor Heat is locked out below this setpoint

points.name: Maximum Main Fan VFD in SZ VAV Heating Mode
points.description: In Single Zone VAV configuration, this is the max fan speed the VFD can modulate up to in Heat Mode

points.name: Minimum Main Fan VFD in Cooling Mode
points.description: In Single Zone VAV configuration, this is the fan speed at which the VFD starts when Cooling is initiated. In a VAV configuration this is the lowest fan speed allowed in the Cooling Mode. In CAV and MUA configurations this should be set to 100%.

points.name: Minimum Main Fan VFD in Heating Mode
points.description: In Single Zone VAV configuration, this is the fan speed at which the VFD starts when Heating is initiated. In a VAV configuration this is the lowest fan speed allowed in the Heating Mode. In CAV and MUA configurations this should be set to 100%.

points.name: Minimum Main Fan VFD in Vent Mode
points.description: Speed at which the VFD operates in the Vent Mode in Single Zone VAV

points.name: Maximum Economizer in Heating Mode
points.description: Max position the Economizer Damper opens to in Supply Air Tempering during Heating Mode. Takes priority over Max Position in High CO2.

points.name: Minimum Economizer Position
points.description: The minimum position of the Outdoor Air damper in the Occupied Mode. This can be reset upwards based on indoor CO2 levels. NOTE: See Economizer Override via BACnet section in the Economizer area of the Sequence of Operations for additional information.

points.name: Maximum Economizer CO2 Reset Limit
points.description: The maximum value the Economizer Minimum Position can be reset up to during CO2 override

points.name: Minimum Carbon Dioxide Setpoint
points.description: This is the threshold CO2 level at which the Economizer Min Damper Position Setpoint begins to be reset higher

points.name: Maximum Carbon Dioxide Setpoint
points.description: This is the CO2 level at which the Economizer Min Damper Position resets to the Economizer Max Position in High CO2. In between the Min and Max CO2 levels the Economizer Min Damper Position is proportionally reset between the configured Min Damper Position and the Max Position in High CO2.

points.name: Indoor Humidity Setpoint Low Reset Limit
points.description: On indoor controlled (non-MUA) units, this is the Humidity setpoint at which the unit leaves Dehumidification. During Coil Temp Reset, this is the lowest Space RH value that corresponds to the High Coil Temp Setpoint. If the VCCX-IP is configured for indoor dewpoint control, this point displays Dew Point instead of Humidity.

points.name: Indoor Humidity Setpoint High Reset Limit
points.description: On indoor controlled (non-MUA) units, this is the Humidity setpoint at which the unit initiates Dehumidification. During Coil Temp Reset, this is the highest Space RH value that corresponds to the Low Coil Temp Setpoint. If the VCCX-IP is configured for indoor dewpoint control, this point displays Dew Point instead of Humidity.

points.name: Duct Static Pressure Setpoint
points.description: Current Static Pressure Setpoint

points.name: Duct Static Pressure Control Deadband
points.description: Value above and below the Duct Static Pressure Setpoint where no control change occurs

points.name: Building Pressure Control Setpoint
points.description: Building Pressure Setpoint or Exhaust Duct Static Pressure Setpoint

points.name: Building Pressure Control Deadband
points.description: Value above and below the Building Pressure Setpoint or the Exhaust Duct Static Pressure Setpoint where no control change occurs

points.name: Minimum Outdoor CFM Requirement
points.description: Minimum Outdoor Airflow CFM Setpoint

points.name: Outdoor CFM Control Deadband
points.description: Controls rate of change for damper signal. As OA CFM moves further from setpoint within this window, the damper makes a larger change.

points.name: Single Zone VAV Fan Speed Integral
points.description: The Integral Constant for Single Zone VAV Fan Control

points.name: Relay Run-time Hours Warning Limit
points.description: If any configured relay’s run time exceeds this number of hours of operation, a warning alarm is generated so that periodic maintenance can be performed

points.name: Cooling Mode Head Pressure Setpoint
points.description: Head Pressure Setpoint in the Cooling Mode

points.name: Dehum Mode Head Pressure Setpoint
points.description: Head Pressure Setpoint in the Dehumidification Mode

points.name: Superheat Setpoint
points.description: Superheat Setpoint

points.name: Maximum Outdoor CFM Requirement
points.description: Maximum Outdoor Airflow CFM Setpoint in High CO2

points.name: Schedule Force
points.description: 0 = Auto (uses controller’s schedule) 1 = Forced Occupied 2 = Forced Unoccupied

points.name: HVAC Mode Override
points.description: Overrides normal controller operation to force the unit into this desired mode. Configuring for “Auto” restores normal unit control of the mode of operation. 0=Auto 1=Vent 2=Cool 3=Heat 4=Vent Dehum 5=Cool Dehum 6=Heat Dehum.

points.name: Fan VFD Override
points.description: Override to force the VFD to this percentage speed. Configuring “Auto” restores normal unit control of the VFD speed.

points.name: Outdoor Air Damper Override
points.description: Overrides all other Outdoor Air Damper position commands to maintain this fixed position. Configuring for “Auto” restores normal unit control of the Outdoor Air Damper/ Economizer operation. NOTE: When a value of 0 or 100% is written the compressors are allowed to operate. Any value between 0-100% the compressors will be locked out. See Economizer Override via BACnet section on page 38 for additional information.

points.name: Supply Setpoint Override
points.description: This overrides whatever setpoint the Supply Air Temperature is currently being controlled to. 0=No Override.

points.name: Space Temperature Value
points.description: If the controller is configured for this operation, the user can write a Space Sensor value

points.name: Space Humidity Value
points.description: If the controller is configured for this operation, the user can write a Space Humidity Sensor value

points.name: Indoor RH Calibration Offset
points.description: If the Space Humidity Sensor is reading incorrectly, use this option to enter an offset humidity to adjust the Sensor’s Humidity

points.name: Relief Fan VFD
points.description: Override to force the VFD to this percentage speed. Configuring “Auto” restores normal unit control of the VFD speed

points.name: Relief Pressure Value
points.description: If the controller is configured for this operation, the user can write Building Pressure Sensor value

points.name: Carbon Dioxide Value
points.description: If the controller is configured for this operation, the user can write a CO2 Sensor value.

points.name: Outdoor Air Temperature Value
points.description: If the controller is configured for this operation, the user can write an Outdoor Sensor value

points.name: Outdoor Air Humidity Value
points.description: If the controller is configured for this operation, the user can write an Outdoor Humidity Sensor value

points.name: High Level Enthalpy (Reserved)
points.description: Reserved

points.name: Low Level Enthalpy (Reserved)
points.description: Reserved

points.name: Max Plenum Pressure Setpoint Reset Limit
points.description: Reserved

points.name: Min Plenum Pressure Setpoint Reset Limit
points.description: Reserved

points.name: Enthalpy Enable Setpoint
points.description: If configured for Comparative Enthalpy Economizer Control, the OA Enthalpy must be below this setpoint by the Enthalpy Enable Deadband before the OA/RA Enthalpy comparison is utilized to enable the Economizer

points.name: EnthalpyEnable Deadband
points.description: The OA Enthalpy must be below the Enthalpy Enable Setpoint by this amount, and the OA Enthalpy must be below the RA Enthalpy by this amount to utilize the Economizer

points.name: Maximum Static Setpoint Reset Limit
points.description: As the most open VAV damper rises above 80%, the static setpoint resets up to this maximum limit

points.name: Minimum Static Setpoint Reset Limit
points.description: As the most open VAV damper drops below 80%, the static setpoint resets down to this minimum reset limit

points.name: Static Setpoint Reset Interval
points.description: The Reset Interval is how often the setpoint reset calculation occurs. This must be an infrequent event, so the default is 15 minutes.

points.name: Cool-Down Target Temperature (See AV: 16 for Warm-Up Target Temperature)
points.description: If Morning Cool-Down is configured then upon entering occupied mode, the Cool-Down Mode activates if the return air is above this temperature by one degree

points.name: Warm-Up Override
points.description: Commands the unit into Morning Warm-Up Mode. 1=Command Warm-Up Mode

points.name: Cool Down Override
points.description: Commands the unit into Morning Cool-Down Mode 1=Command Cool-Down Mode

points.name: Return Air High Limit Protection (for Voting Units or CV Units Only)
points.description: If the Return Air Temperature goes above this limit, the unit reverts to Return Air Control. NOTE: This point only applies when the BMS is writing a space temperature value to the VCCX-IP and that value is lost.

points.name: Return Air Low Limit Protection (for Voting Units or CV Units Only)
points.description: If the Return Air Temperature goes below this limit, the unit reverts to Return Air Control. NOTE: This point only applies when the BMS is writing a space temperature value to the VCCX-IP and that value is lost.

points.name: Sump Drain Override
points.description: Setting this value to 1 turns the Sump Drain relay on. Setting this value to 0 sets the relay operation to Auto. 0=Auto 1=On

points.name: Return Plenum Pressure Setpoint
points.description: Current Return Plenum Pressure Setpoint

points.name: Return Plenum Pressure Deadband
points.description: Value above and below the Return Plenum Pressure Setpoint where no control change occurs

points.name: Dehum Lockout Setpoint
points.description: If Outdoor Air temperature is below this setpoint, Dehumidification Mode is locked out

points.name: Emergency Compressor Lockout
points.description: This point can be used to lockout the compressors if the BMS wants them disabled.

points.name: Supply Air Dew Point Setpoint
points.description: When the VCCX-IP is configured for DX-DOAS control it modulates the compressors to try to maintain the Supply Air Dew Point Setpoint during dehumidification mode.

points.name: Cooling Enabled Status
points.description: Status that indicates Mechanical Cooling is enabled based on the Cooling Lockout

points.name: Heating Enabled Status
points.description: Status that indicates that Mechanical Heating is enabled based on the Heating Lockout

points.name: Economizer Enabled Status
points.description: Status that indicates the Economizer is enabled based on the Economizer Enable Setpoint

points.name: Aux Heat Enabled Status
points.description: Heat Pump Auxiliary Heat enabled

points.name: Emergency Heat Enabled Status
points.description: Shows the Emergency Heat is enabled based on the Compressor Heating Lockout

points.name: Fan Proof of Airflow Status
points.description: Proof of Airflow Binary Input Status

points.name: Exhaust Hood On/Off Status
points.description: Exhaust Hood On/Off Binary Input Status

points.name: Remote Forced Occupied Status
points.description: Remote Forced Occupied Mode Binary Input Status

points.name: Remote Forced Cooling Status
points.description: Remote Forced Cooling Mode Binary Input Status

points.name: Remote Forced Heating Status
points.description: Remote Forced Heating Mode Binary Input Status

points.name: Remote Force Dehum Status
points.description: Remote Force Dehumidification Mode Binary Input Status

points.name: Bad Supply Air Sensor
points.description: Alarm that indicates a failure of the Supply Air Sensor

points.name: Bad Return Air Sensor
points.description: Alarm that indicates a failure of the Return Air Sensor

points.name: Bad Outdoor Air Sensor
points.description: Failure of the Outdoor Air Temperature Sensor

points.name: Bad Space Temp Sensor
points.description: Failure of the Space Temperature Sensor. If Space is the controlling sensor, the unit shuts down.

points.name: Bad Carbon Dioxide Sensor
points.description: Failure of the CO2 Sensor

points.name: Bad Building Pressure Sensor
points.description: Alarm indicating missing or failed Building Pressure Sensor

points.name: Bad Outdoor Airflow Sensor
points.description: An Outdoor Airflow Sensor is configured, but not detected

points.name: Bad Exhaust Airflow Sensor
points.description: An Exhaust Airflow Sensor is configured, but not detected

points.name: Bad Supply Airflow Sensor
points.description: A Supply Airflow Sensor is configured, but not detected

points.name: Bad Return Airflow Sensor
points.description: A Return Airflow Sensor is configured, but not detected

points.name: Mechanical Cooling Alarm
points.description: Compressor Relays are enabled but the Supply Air Temperature has not fallen 5°F w/in a user-adjustable time period. This does not apply to Modulating Cooling.

points.name: Mechanical Heating Alarm
points.description: Heating Mode has been initiated but the Supply Air Temperature has not risen 5°F w/in a user-adjustable time period. Alarms on the MODGAS-X and Preheat-X Controller generate this alarm. This alarm does not apply to SCR Heat, Modulating Hot Water or Steam Heating.

points.name: Fan Proving Alarm
points.description: Alarm that indicates an Airflow failure from the Main Fan. Heating and Cooling are disabled.

points.name: Dirty Filter Alarm
points.description: Alarm that indicates the filters are dirty

points.name: Emergency Shutdown Alarm
points.description: Alarm that indicates that Emergency Shutdown has been activated. Shuts the unit down.

points.name: Relay Runtime Warning
points.description: Indicates when any of the configured relays exceeds a configured number of hours of runtime. Can be used to schedule service, etc.

points.name: Economizer Missing Alarm
points.description: Title 24 operation indicates missing economizer feedback

points.name: Economizer Title 24 Failure A
points.description: Title 24 Air Temperature Sensor Failure

points.name: Economizer Title 24 Failure B
points.description: Title 24 Not Economizing when it should

points.name: Economizer Title 24 Failure C
points.description: Title 24 Economizing when it should not

points.name: Economizer Title 24 Failure D
points.description: Title 24 Damper Not Modulating

points.name: Economizer Title 24 Failure E
points.description: Title 24 Excess Outdoor Air

points.name: High Supply Temp Cutoff
points.description: The Supply Air has risen above the Hi SAT Cutoff Setpoint. Heating stages deactivate and the fan continues to run. This alarm is generated.

points.name: Low Supply Temp Cutoff
points.description: The Supply Air has fallen below the Low SAT Cutoff Setpoint. Cooling stages deactivate. After 10 minutes, the fan deactivates and this alarm is generated.

points.name: High Control Mode Alarm
points.description: Occurs when the Controlling Sensor Temperature rises above the Cooling Mode Enable Setpoint plus the Control Mode High Alarm Offset. Applies only to Space or Return Air Temperature controlled units.

points.name: Low Control Mode Alarm
points.description: Occurs when the Controlling Sensor Temperature falls below the Heating Mode Enable Setpoint minus the Control Mode Low Alarm Offset. Applies only to Space or Return Air Temperature controlled units.

points.name: Missing Refrigerant Module #1
points.description: Refrigerant Module #1 is bad or missing

points.name: Missing Refrigerant Module #2
points.description: Refrigerant Module #2 is bad or missing

points.name: Missing Refrigerant Module #3
points.description: Refrigerant Module #3 is bad or missing

points.name: Missing Refrigerant Module #4
points.description: Refrigerant Module #4 is bad or missing

points.name: Missing Preheater Board
points.description: Preheater Module is bad or missing

points.name: Missing Reheat Board
points.description: The MHGR board is configured but not detected

points.name: Missing Mod Gas Board
points.description: The MODGAS board is configured but not detected

points.name: Missing EM1 Board
points.description: EM1 Expansion Board is bad or missing

points.name: Missing 12 Relay Expansion Board
points.description: The 12 Relay Expansion Board is configured but not detected

points.name: On Board Relay 1 Main Fan
points.description: Current Status of Main Fan Relay #1 on Main Board

points.name: On Board Relay 2
points.description: Current Status of Configurable Relay #2 on Main Board

points.name: On Board Relay 3
points.description: Current Status of Configurable Relay #3 on Main Board

points.description: Current Status of Configurable Relay #4 on Main Board

points.description: Current Status of Configurable Relay #5 on Main Board

points.description: Current Status of Configurable Relay #6 on Main Board

points.description: Current Status of Configurable Relay #7 on Main Board

points.description: Current Status of Configurable Relay #8 on Main Board

points.description: Current Status of Configurable Relay #1 on EM1 Board

points.name: Expansion Board EM1 Relay 2
points.description: Current Status of Configurable Relay #2 on EM1 Board

points.name: Expansion Board EM1 Relay 5
points.description: Current Status of Configurable Relay #5 on EM1 Board

points.description: Current Status of Configurable Relay #1 on 12 Relay Board

points.description: Current Status of Configurable Relay #10 on 12 Relay Board

points.name: 12 Relay Expansion Board Relay 11
points.description: Current Status of Configurable Relay #11 on 12 Relay Board

points.name: 12 Relay Expansion Board Relay 12
points.description: Current Status of Configurable Relay #12 on 12 Relay Board

points.name: Preheater Enable Status
points.description: Status of Preheater Enable Input

points.name: Preheater Emergency Shutdown
points.description: Status of Preheater Emergency Shutdown Input

points.name: Preheater Spare Binary Input #3
points.description: Status of Preheater Binary Input #3

points.name: MODGAS Enable Status
points.description: Status of MODGAS Controller

points.name: MHGR Enable Status
points.description: Status of MHGRV Controller

points.name: A1 Compressor Enable
points.description: Current Status of Enable Signal to Compressor A1

points.name: A2 Compressor Enable
points.description: Current Status of Enable Signal to Compressor A2

points.name: A1 Compressor Alarms
points.description: Indicates an RSM alarm is present on the A1 circuit

points.name: A2 Compressor Alarms
points.description: Indicates an RSM alarm is present on the A2 circuit

points.name: A1-2 Defrost Switch
points.description: Outside Coil A1/A2 Temp Switch for Defrost Mode

points.name: A1-2 Water Proof of Flow
points.description: A1/A2 Water Proof of Flow Switch

points.name: A1-4 Emergency Shutdown (RSMD)
points.description: Emergency Shutdown Input on Module A

points.name: Refrigerant Module 1 Relay 1
points.description: Current Status of Compressor A1 Enable Relay

points.name: Refrigerant Module 1 Relay 2
points.description: Current Status of Compressor A2 Enable Relay

points.name: Refrigerant Module 1 Relay 3
points.description: Current Status of Condenser 1 Enable Relay

points.name: Refrigerant Module 1 Relay 4
points.description: Current Status of Relay #4

points.description: Current Status of Relay #5

points.name: B1 Compressor Enable
points.description: Current Status of Enable Signal to Compressor B1

points.name: B2 Compressor Enable
points.description: Current Status of Enable Signal to Compressor B2

points.name: B1 Compressor Alarms
points.description: Indicates an RSM alarm is present on the B1 circuit

points.name: B2 Compressor Alarms
points.description: Indicates an RSM alarm is present on the B2 circuit

points.name: B1-2 Defrost Switch
points.description: Outside Coil B1/B2 Temp Switch for Defrost Mode

points.name: B1-2 Water Proof of Flow
points.description: B1/B2 Switch for Water Proof of Flow

points.name: B1-4 Emergency Shutdown (RSMD)
points.description: Emergency Shutdown Input on Module B

points.name: Refrigerant Module 2 Relay 1
points.description: Current Status of Compressor 1 Enable Relay

points.name: Refrigerant Module 2 Relay 2
points.description: Current Status of Compressor 2 Enable Relay

points.name: Refrigerant Module 2 Relay 3
points.description: Current Status of Condenser 1 Enable Relay

points.name: Refrigerant Module 2 Relay 4
points.description: Current Status of Relay #4

points.name: Refrigerant Module 2 Relay 5
points.description: Current Status of Relay #5

points.name: C1 Compressor Enable
points.description: Current Status of Enable Signal to Compressor C1

points.name: C2 Compressor Enable
points.description: Current Status of Enable Signal to Compressor C2

points.name: C1 Compressor Alarms
points.description: Indicates an RSM alarm is present on the C1 circuit

points.name: C2 Compressor Alarms
points.description: Indicates an RSM alarm is present on the C2 circuit

points.name: C1-2 Defrost Switch
points.description: Outside Coil C1/C2Temp Switch for Defrost Mode

points.name: C1-2 Water Proof of Flow
points.description: C1/C2 Switch for Water Proof of Flow

points.name: C1-4 Emergency Shutdown (RSMD)
points.description: Emergency Shutdown Input on Module C

points.name: Refrigerant Module 3 Relay 1
points.description: Current Status of Compressor 1 Enable Relay

points.name: Refrigerant Module 3 Relay 2
points.description: Current Status of Compressor 2 Enable Relay

points.name: Refrigerant Module 3 Relay 3
points.description: Current Status Condenser 1 Enable Relay

points.name: Refrigerant Module 3 Relay 4
points.description: Current Status of Relay #4

points.name: Refrigerant Module 3 Relay 5
points.description: Current Status of Relay #5

points.name: D1 Compressor Enable
points.description: Current Status of Enable Signal to Compressor D1

points.name: D2 Compressor Enable
points.description: Current Status of Enable Signal to Compressor D2

points.name: D1 Compressor Alarms
points.description: Indicates an RSM alarm is present on the D1 circuit

points.name: D2 Compressor Alarms
points.description: Indicates an RSM alarm is present on the D2 circuit

points.name: D1-2 Defrost Switch
points.description: Outside Coil D1/D2 Temp Switch for Defrost Mode

points.name: D1-2 Water Proof of Flow
points.description: D1/D2 Switch for Water Proof of Flow

points.name: D1-4 Emergency Shutdown (RSMD)
points.description: Emergency Shutdown Input on Module D

points.description: Current Status of Compressor 1 Enable Relay

points.description: Current Status of Compressor 2 Enable Relay

points.description: Current Status of Condenser 1 Enable Relay

points.name: Refrigerant Module 4 Relay 4
points.description: Current Status of Relay #4

points.description: Current Status of Relay #5

points.description: Preheater Alarm Indicator

points.name: Return Fan Proving Alarm
points.description: Exhaust Fan / Return Fan Proof of Flow Alarm

points.name: Compressor Running A
points.description: Current Run Status of Compressor A

points.name: Compressor Running B
points.description: Current Run Status of Compressor B

points.name: Compressor Running C
points.description: Current Run Status of Compressor C

points.name: Compressor Running C2
points.description: Current Run Status of Compressor C2

points.description: Current Run Status of Compressor D

points.name: Compressor Running E
points.description: Current Run Status of Compressor E

points.description: Current Run Status of Compressor E2

points.description: Current Run Status of Compressor F2

points.name: Return Fan Proving Status
points.description: Proof of Return Fan Airflow Binary Input Status

points.name: IAQ Mode Active
points.description: Indicates that IAQ Mode is active

points.name: Heat Wheel Defrost Active
points.description: Indicates Heat Wheel Defrost is active

points.name: Direct Fire Status
points.description: Signal on EM1 binary input 2 from Direct Fire Module that indicates that the direct fire heater is active.

points.name: Direct Fire Alarm Status
points.description: Signal on EM1 binary input 3 that indicates there is an active alarm on the Direct Fire Module.

points.name: Temp Rise Warning
points.description: Indicates the heat rise when direct fire heat is active has exceeded the max heat rise by more than 1°F.

points.name: Temp Rise Alarm
points.description: Indicates the heat rise when direct fire heat is active has exceeded the max heat rise by more than 2°F.

points.name: Temp Rise Lockout
points.description: Indicates three High Temp Rise alarms occurred within a 1-hour span and the unit heat is disabled until the unit is serviced.

points.name: High CO2 Rise Warning
points.description: Indicates that high return CO2 was detected when running direct fire heat.

points.name: High CO2 Rise Alarm
points.description: Indicates high return CO2 was detected and direct fire heat has been temporarily shut down for recovery.

points.name: High CO2 Rise Lockout
points.description: Indicates three CO2 warning alarms occurred within a 1-hour span and direct fire heat is now disabled until the unit is serviced.

points.name: Ignition Lockout
points.description: Indicates an active alarm on the Direct Fire Module.

points.name: Direct Fire Status Lockout
points.description: Indicates that Direct Fire Status Signal is not active within 10 minutes of a call to activate the heat. Heat Enable signal is removed and direct fire heating is locked out.

points.name: Direct Fire Setpoint Override
points.description: Indicates the max calculated heat rise is limiting the Supply Air Setpoint to a lower value.

points.name: Fan Array Failure
points.description: Indicates a Fan Array Failure
